Sarah Chen
sarah.chen@email.com | (415) 555-0198 | Seattle, WA | linkedin.com/in/sarahchen | github.com/sarahchen

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Full-stack software engineer with 6 years of experience designing and building scalable web applications, distributed systems, and data pipelines. Passionate about clean architecture, developer tooling, and mentoring.

EXPERIENCE

Staff Software Engineer — CloudScale Technologies
Mar 2023 - Present
- Architected a real-time event processing system handling 2M+ events/hour using Kafka and Python
- Led migration of monolithic application to microservices, reducing deployment cycles from weekly to daily
- Designed multi-tenant data isolation layer supporting 500+ enterprise customers
- Established engineering standards and conducted architecture reviews for a team of 12 engineers
- Reduced infrastructure costs by 35% through container optimization and autoscaling improvements

Senior Software Engineer — Nexus Software
Aug 2020 - Feb 2023
- Built and maintained a distributed task scheduling system processing 50K+ jobs daily
- Implemented real-time analytics dashboard using React, GraphQL, and PostgreSQL
- Optimized database queries reducing average API latency from 450ms to 120ms
- Mentored 4 junior developers through structured onboarding and pair programming
- Introduced automated integration testing, increasing deployment confidence and reducing rollbacks by 70%

Software Engineer — BrightPath Labs
Jun 2018 - Jul 2020
- Developed RESTful APIs serving 100K+ daily active users using Django and PostgreSQL
- Built automated CI/CD pipeline with Jenkins, reducing release cycle from 2 weeks to 2 days
- Implemented feature flagging system enabling safe rollouts for 15+ concurrent experiments
- Collaborated with data science team to deploy ML model serving infrastructure

SKILLS
Python, Go, TypeScript, React, Node.js, Django, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, MongoDB, Kafka, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS (EC2, ECS, Lambda, S3, DynamoDB), Terraform, GraphQL, gRPC, CI/CD, Git, Agile/Scrum

CERTIFICATIONS
